title: gate_evaluated event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Records a single gate evaluation. The quality-gates subprocess returns its own JSON; this records the kernel's interpretation of that JSON.

metrics.description: Gate-specific scalars (files_changed, loc_changed, etc.). Validated against gate-specific shape, not here.

waived_count.description: Number of subprocess-reported violations on this gate that an effective waiver suppressed before disposition. 0 when no waivers applied. Always present so downstream consumers can rely on its existence.

waiver_ids.description: Stable ids of the waivers credited with the suppression on this gate, deduped + sorted. Omitted when waived_count is 0.
